session_info.objective: Migration to 3D-only experience and subsequent debugging/stability fixes.

project_summary: The application was migrated from a hybrid 2D/3D interface to a full 3D WebGL environment. All instrument views (Drums, Bass, Harmony, Sequencer, Pads, Drone) were redesigned as interactive 3D stations with custom controls (Knob3D, Button3D, Slider3D).

technical_details.architecture: Single-page WebGL application with state managed by Zustand and audio logic handled via Tone.js. A custom AudioVisualBridge synchronizes audio events with 3D visuals.
technical_details.spatial_layout: Instruments are positioned in a cosmic field with specific camera presets for focusing on each station.

major_milestones.description: Redesigned all 2D views into 3D stations. Implemented interactive controls and camera navigation.
Resolved critical null pointer exceptions in DrumMachine3D, fixed CSS syntax errors, and optimized performance by throttling visual store updates.

resolved_issues.fix: Fixed missing coordinate keys for drum TRIG buttons in SpatialLayout.ts.
Removed nested and unclosed :root selector causing build failures.
Optimized AudioReactiveObject to avoid re-creating geometry every frame.

history.tasks_checkpoint: Phase 1-9 completed (Restoration of all legacy features into 3D space).
history.verification: Production build successfully verified (2.88s build time).
